$comment: C11/C23 6.4.5: a u"AB" (char16_t) string literal read as unsigned short* — p[0]+p[1] = 0x0041 + 0x0042 = 131. Exercises the wide-string HIR encode (two LE 16-bit units) + the element-width-aware .rodata emitter across all 4 targets, plus the release optimizer arm. A narrow-bytes regression flips the exit code.
